response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive exposure to cloud infrastructure (AWS), and relevant work with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks, aligning well with core responsibilities. However, he lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and formal leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with agentic workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Deep full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years in production AI systems or RAG/vector database implementation
Limited visibility into enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or stakeholder discovery
Absence of documented experience with LLM metrics, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or AI evaluation pipelines
